web_results.title: Claude Code Complete Guide 2026: From Basics to Advanced MCP, Agents & Git Workflows
web_results.description: Quick Answer: Claude Code is Anthropic's official AI-powered command-line interface (CLI) that runs directly in your terminal, providing intelligent coding assistance with full file system access, Git integration, and extensibility through MCP servers...

web_results.title: Connect Claude Code to tools via MCP - Claude Code Docs
web_results.description: # Add a user server claude mcp add --transport http hubspot --scope user https://mcp.hubspot.com/anthropic

I automated the Claude Code and codex workflow into a single CLI tool: they debate, review, and fix code together ... Accessibility Reddit, Inc. © 2026.

web_results.title: Anthropic
web_results.description: An IDE assistant that integrates git operations, file manipulation, package managers, testing frameworks, and deployment pipelines. An operations coordinator that connects Slack, GitHub, Google Drive, Jira, company databases, and dozens of MCP servers simultaneously.

web_results.title: Anthropic just released a mobile version of Claude Code called Remote Control | VentureBeat
web_results.description: This ensures that local context—filesystem access, environment variables, and Model Context Protocol (MCP)servers—remains active and reachable even if the user is miles away from their desk. Claude Code Remote Control functions as a secure bridge between your local terminal and Anthropic’s cloud interface, which provides the Anthropic AI models, Opus 4.6 and Sonnet 4.6, that power Claude Code.

web_results.title: Claude Code CLI: The Definitive Technical Reference
web_results.description: Master Claude Code CLI with this 5,000+ line reference. Covers hooks, MCP servers, subagents, skills, permissions, and enterprise patterns for 2026.

web_results.title: Anthropic says Claude Code transformed programming. Now Claude Cowork is coming for the rest of the enterprise. | VentureBeat
web_results.description: Anthropic is making its boldest enterprise push yet with Claude Cowork, rolling out private plug-in marketplaces, deep integrations, and AI agent tools that are reshaping corporate adoption and rattling software markets.

web_results.title: A Guide to Claude Code 2.0 and getting better at using coding agents | sankalp's blog
web_results.description: (Tools: All tools) - claude-code-guide: Use this agent when the user asks questions ("Can Claude...", "Does Claude...", "How do I...") about: (1) Claude Code (the CLI tool) - features, hooks, slash commands, MCP servers, settings, IDE integrations, keyboard shortcuts; (2) Claude Agent SDK - building custom agents; (3) Claude API (formerly Anthropic API) - API usage, tool use, Anthropic SDK usage.

web_results.title: Cooking with Claude Code: The Complete Tutorial & Guide | Sid Bharath
web_results.description: Updated for February 2026 — I first wrote this guide on July 4, 2025 (freedom!) and have been updating it regularly as new features come out. This latest revision covers Opus 4.6, Agent Teams, automatic memory, fast mode, and more.

web_results.title: Claude Agent SDK | Promptfoo
web_results.description: To opt back into caching for deterministic MCP tools (e.g., code search, static knowledge bases), set cache_mcp: true: providers: - id: anthropic:claude-agent-sdk config: cache_mcp: true mcp: servers: - command: npx args: ['-y', '@my/deterministic-mcp-server'] name: my-server

news_results.description: Unofficial solutions, while functional, were often brittle and prone to timeout issues. Remote Control replaces these workarounds with a native streaming connection

news_results.title: Why Anthropic Launching Claude Code Security Is Great News for the Industry | Snyk
news_results.description: Is Anthropic's Claude Code Security a disruption? Learn how Snyk's platform leverages layered AI and deterministic analysis for complete vulnerability detection and automated remediation.

news_results.title: Anthropic Links AI Agent With Tools for Investment Banking, HR - Bloomberg
news_results.description: Anthropic PBC is expanding the reach of its Claude chatbot into new sectors, weeks after the startup sparked a market meltdown with the release of tools that raised questions about AI’s potential to render entire businesses obsolete.

news_results.title: Infosec community panics over Anthropic Claude Code Security • The Register
news_results.description: ai-pocalypse Anthropic sent the infosec community into a tizzy on Friday when it rolled out Claude Code Security, a new feature that scans codebases for vulnerabilities and suggests patches to fix the issues · The new security capability is currently available as a limited research preview ...

news_results.title: Anthropic Targets More Industries With Claude Cowork Plugins
news_results.description: The update to Claude Cowork gives admins the ability to set up their own plugins and provides new prebuilt ones for specific industries.

news_results.title: Anthropic targets core business systems with new Claude plug-ins | CIO
news_results.description: New integrations connect Claude to finance, HR, and engineering tools, as CIOs assess productivity gains against governance and data security risks.
